mnemonics.title: Data States
mnemonics.content: **R T U** - Remember The User? (Rest, Transit, Use) - Helps recall the three states of data: At Rest, In Transit, In Use.

mnemonics.title: Symmetric vs. Asymmetric
mnemonics.content: **SAME** for Symmetric (Same key). **PEOPLE** for Asymmetric (Public/Private key pair).
